lines.text: Pokemon literally made an entire generation cry and nobody talks about it.
Number 10. Latios sacrificing himself to save Alto Mare from a tsunami.
Number 9. Luxray dying to protect its trainer in the manga. Pure devastation.
Number 8. Lucario turning to crystal after saving the Tree of Beginning.
Number 7. Stoutland passing away while Litten watched helplessly.
Number 6. The Marowak ghost who died protecting her Cubone baby.
Number 5. Celebi literally dying in Ashs arms before time travel saved it.
Number 4. Darkrai taking a fatal hit to protect everyone in Rise of Darkrai.
Number 3. Mew and Mewtwo forcing Pokemon to fight until exhaustion.
Number 2. Jessies Dustox leaving forever. Even villains get heartbreak.
Number 1. Ash turning to stone while Pikachu cried and shocked his lifeless body.

outro_line: A kids show taught us more about grief than our parents ever did.

_topic.title: Top 10 Pokemon Deaths That Traumatized Every Kid
_topic.hook: Pokemon literally made an entire generation cry and nobody talks about it.
_topic.angle: Combines childhood nostalgia with surprising dark moments most casual fans forgot or never knew existed across games, anime, and manga.
